description_long: This is a gold-toned wristwatch with a solid metal link bracelet and a round case. The watch face features three subdials, slender hour markers, and two pushers along with a crown on the right side, suggesting chronograph functionality. The bracelet is composed of rectangular links with a polished finish, and the clasp is visible on the underside. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a uniform metallic sheen and minimal surface ornamentation. The watch dial is clean, with subtle branding and no visible gemstones or excessive decoration. The construction appears robust, suitable for daily wear in urban environments.
description: A gold-toned metal wristwatch with a round face, three subdials, and a polished link bracelet. The design is sleek, modern, and minimally ornamented.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round watch face, three subdials, hour markers, and the full width of the bracelet.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the case, the crown, and pushers on the right side, as well as the bracelet's curvature.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the clasp mechanism and the segmented links of the bracelet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth case profile and bracelet curvature, with no visible controls.
